name: Grafton Pickleball Club
description: Grafton Pickleball Club is a place to play pickleball in Grafton, IL. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Wittman Park
description: Wittman Park is a place to play pickleball in Jerseyville, IL. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
